title: GATE-2-PREP runtime record
objective:
Run script:
"""
sha = '5dcb26cdbb36c21ccd9df7f6e1d9769406ad5c94'
queue_path = Path('governance/roadmap/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json')
queue = json.loads(queue_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8')) if queue_path.exists() else {'tasks': []}
for task in queue.get('tasks', []):
    if task.get('id') == 'GATE-2-PREP':
        task['status'] = 'DONE'
        task['runtime_sha'] = sha
        task['runtime_runner'] = 'governance/runtime/minimal_governance_loop_runner.py'
        task['completed_at'] = '2026-06-04T15:33:07Z'
pending = [task.get('id') for task in queue.get('tasks', []) if task.get('status') == 'PENDING']
queue['updated_at'] = '2026-06-04T15:34:00Z'
queue['queue_state'] = 'HAS_PENDING_TASKS' if pending else 'EMPTY_NO_PENDING_TASKS'
queue['next_action'] = ('execute first PENDING task: ' + pending[0]) if pending else 'await operator or Claude to add next tasks; do not invent tasks'
queue_path.write_text(json.dumps(queue, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(queue_path))
log_path = Path('governance/logs/execution_log.jsonl')
log_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
existing = log_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if log_path.exists() else ''
line = json.dumps({'date':'2026-06-04T15:33:07Z','id':'GATE-2-PREP','trace_id':'gate2_prep_runtime_path_repair','sha':sha,'status':'done','runtime_runner':'governance/runtime/minimal_governance_loop_runner.py','workflow_files_touched':False}, ensure_ascii=False)
if line not in existing:
    existing = existing + line
log_path.write_text(existing, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(log_path))
state = Path('governance/state/GATE2_PREP_RUNTIME_RECORD_CLOSE.json')
state.write_text(json.dumps({'id':'GATE-2-PREP-RECORD','trace_id':'gate2_prep_runtime_record_close','status':'completed','release_pass':False,'runtime_sha':sha,'next_pending':pending[0] if pending else None,'workflow_files_touched':False}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(state))
report = Path('governance/reports/GATE2_PREP_RUNTIME_RECORD_CLOSE.md')
report.write_text('# GATE-2-PREP runtime record. Status: completed. Runtime runner SHA: ' + sha + '. Next pending: ' + (pending[0] if pending else 'none') + '. Workflow lock respected.', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(report))
"""No issue comments.
